title: Unified
description: Converts items in specified tags into a specified item.
body:
This matches items in tags and converts them to the desired item, similar to the UniDict mod.

May be a poor implementation. May cause lag with a lot of specified conversions.

Config format (in unified.properties) is tagid=itemid, with colons replaced with dashes, eg. fabric-pickaxes=minecraft-item_frame.

Once I figure out how I may add something to prevent certain ores from certain mods from generating (tentative).

Do note that this mod may work on MC versions other than the ones specified.

While I don't expect it to break any worlds, do make a backup.
